_comment: Single source of truth for the library's structured trace events. sandbox/trace-events.bash is GENERATED from this file by scripts/gen-trace-events.py (do not edit it by hand) — the gen-trace-events pre-commit hook regenerates it, and tests/test_trace_events_ssot.py fails CI if it ever drifts. Every event here has a real emitter in the library (firewall init/refresh/expand, the hardener, the audit sink), asserted by the same test. Consumer-specific events (a monitor, a redactor, managed-settings, host-side worktree seed/extract) are NOT library events and live in the consumer's own overlay.
